## Problem

What reproducibility, state coverage, accessibility, or evidence problem does this fix?

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
- [ ] all declared states inspected
- [ ] desktop and narrow screenshots reviewed
- [ ] `RUN_LOG.md` completed
- [ ] no credentials, customer data, account identifiers, or unrelated desktop content
- [ ] no promotional links, generated marketing art, or fabricated results

## Limitations

What remains unverified or intentionally out of scope?
